title: Angular Basics
source: angular.dev official docs (current, v20) + Angular University; standalone + signals era

items.label: What Angular is, SPA/framework overview, Angular vs React/Vue, the CLI
Project structure, bootstrapping, standalone components (current default), TypeScript role
@Component, standalone component anatomy, selectors, styles, view encapsulation
Template syntax: interpolation, property/attribute/class/style binding, event binding, two-way binding
Built-in control flow (@if/@for/@switch), the legacy *ngIf/*ngFor contrast
Attribute directives (ngClass/ngStyle), custom directives, host binding
Built-in pipes, the async pipe, pure vs impure pipes
Custom pipes, parameters, performance considerations
@Input/@Output + the input()/output() signal APIs, EventEmitter, two-way binding
ViewChild/ContentChild (+ viewChild/contentChild signal queries), template reference variables
Services, providedIn, the inject() function vs constructor injection
Hierarchical injectors, injection tokens, provider scopes
signal(), computed(), effect(), reading/writing signals, the reactivity model
Signal inputs/outputs/queries, linkedSignal/resource awareness, signals vs RxJS
Lifecycle hooks (ngOnInit/ngOnChanges/ngOnDestroy/ngAfterViewInit etc.)
Change detection (Zone.js vs zoneless/signal-based), OnPush strategy
Template-driven vs reactive forms, FormControl/FormGroup/FormBuilder, typed forms
Validation (built-in + custom validators), form state, error display
HttpClient, provideHttpClient, GET/POST, typed responses
RxJS Observable basics, the async pipe, interceptors intro (deep RxJS in the advanced track)
